hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,datetime,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); is_tp_rp=any(p in fp for p in ['TP-','RP-']); os.makedirs('artifacts/logs',exist_ok=True) if is_tp_rp else None; open('artifacts/logs/execution.log','a').write(datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')+' [write] '+fp+'\n') if is_tp_rp else None" 2>/dev/null; exit 0

python3 -c "import sys,json,datetime,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); is_agent=any(p in cmd for p in ['codex','gemini','delegate']); os.makedirs('artifacts/logs',exist_ok=True) if is_agent else None; open('artifacts/logs/execution.log','a').write(datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')+' [bash] '+cmd[:120]+'\n') if is_agent else None" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
